plan_binding_snapshot.title: CP00-582 RP18.P09.M06.S07-RP18.P09.M10.S10 generated_from_weighted_implementation_ledger
plan_binding_snapshot.renumbering_policy: Pack IDs are monotonic after the latest live closeout pack. If a requested locked queue skips live-open ledger units, live-open units are inserted first and requested packs are shifted with correction_reason.

implementation_summary.summary: CP00-582 implements descriptor-only coverage of the RP18.P09 closeout handoff slice: the M06 Synthetic Fixture Set tail (the fourteen remaining rows), the full M07 Test And Golden Case Set cycle (twenty-two rows), the full M08 Hermes Evidence Packet cycle (twenty rows), the full M09 Claude Review Packet cycle (twenty rows), and the full M10 Closeout And Next Handoff cycle (ten rows) as five descriptor-only sections over 86 planned rows with Hermes evidence (H18), Claude review packet (C18), and CP00-583 handoff closing RP18 AI Legal Workflows and routing to RP19 Client Portal, without opening AI legal workflows, precedent, clause markup, or DD extraction runtime or any other closed runtime surface.

parsed_review.summary: CP00-582 is a descriptor-only closeout/handoff pack covering the RP18.P09 closeout slice (M06 tail of 14 rows + full M07 22, M08 20, M09 20, M10 10 = 86 units) and closing program RP18, routing to RP19 (Client Portal) at CP00-583/RP19.P00.M00.S01. Every layer was verified by read-only inspection and is internally consistent: (1) pack binding (registry.js:528), contract current_pack (contract.json:16), manifest, baseline, and closeout-pack-plan.json (line 406) all agree on risk C / 86 units / range RP18.P09.M06.S07-RP18.P09.M10.S10 / upstream CP00-581 / next CP00-583 / next_subphase RP19.P00.M00.S01, with deviation_from_plan=false; the plan confirms RP18.P09.M10.S10 is the last RP18 unit and CP00-583 begins RP19. (2) All counts reconcile (micro-phase 14+22+20+20+10=86; deliverables implementation 57 / claude_review 12 / security_audit 8 / test 4 / ui 4 / hermes_evidence 1 = 86, matching the prompt and hand-counted baseline included_units). (3) All 7 required public exports exist (service.js/validators.js) and are surfaced via index.js export-* wildcards, so index_export_check holds. (4) freezeCp582Result (service.js:3909) hard-sets no_real_data=true, writes_product_state=false and all dispatch/write flags false after the input spread, making the no-write/no-real-data boundary structural; freezeCp582Validation attaches the no_write attestation to every validation. (5) Validators check coverage against the real plan plus descriptor-only rows, no-write attestation (promotes_claude_to_final_approval=false, claims_enterprise_trust_from_local_validation=false), authority boundary, and handoff target; tests load the real contract and plan (not stubs) and assert coverage.valid, descriptor-only rows, and the RP19 handoff; the contract validator does deepEqual between contract JSON and registry constants. (6) command-evidence shows production_ready=false with status implementation_and_plan_gates_passed_pending_final_closeout (correct posture: descriptor verified, runtime not opened, human approval required) and all 28 commands exit 0 including npm test, npm run validate, and git diff --check. (7) Authority boundary preserved everywhere: Claude read-only/not final approver, enterprise trust not claimed from local validation, Hermes used only for deterministic descriptor evidence packets (no_hermes_runtime_receipt=true), not product runtime. (8) Review-hardening requirements (forbidden_review_evidence covering auth failures, zero-byte, malformed/fenced JSON, tool-call-shaped output, missing references; hardened_review_sequence) are encoded and inherited; readiness auth-preflight passed and validation-report shows no forbidden tools, schema present, summary-only disallowed for this Risk C pack. The dirty UI files (progress-control-room) and the ldip invalid-attempt JSON are correctly classified as unrelated/out-of-scope and excluded from manifest source_refs. The pack-level readiness claim is fully supported; no P0/P1/P2/P3 findings.

commit_policy.message: Close CP00-582 ai legal workflows core p09 closeout handoff slice descriptor pack
